title: malvastrum ribifolium
intro: Malvastrum ribifolium, also known as the Mexican hollyhock, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Malvastrum ribifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
